doctrine: A product exists when a stranger can name it, see a price, and reach a checkout. Anything less is an artifact. This file is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH that binds each product to (a) the exact Stripe account+price it charges through and (b) the exact repo/folder a deploy must come from. `source_of_truth` is load-bearing: it exists to PREVENT the scaffold-over-real-app clobber that hit story-studio-live on 2026-07-16.
generated_by: read-only inventory subagent (vercel + stripe MCP, repo cross-reference). NO FAKE GREEN: fields that could not be verified against a live source are marked UNKNOWN, never fabricated.

field_glossary.stripe_account_id: acct_... that OWNS the stripe_product_id + price_ids. Stripe object IDs are account-scoped: the suffix after the timestamp encodes the account (e.g. ...DK7Brrgheo => acct_1TPOYkDK7Brrgheo; ...DINF9KNAIC => acct_1Tdge9DINF9KNAIC). A key from any OTHER account returns 'No such price'.
field_glossary.source_of_truth: The EXACT repo/folder (and git branch/target) a deploy for this product MUST come from. UNKNOWN means it is not reproducibly present in this repo checkout and must be recovered from the live deploy before any redeploy.
field_glossary.health_check: The single request that proves the product is sellable.

acct_1TPOYkDK7Brrgheo.verified_via: stripe MCP get_stripe_account_info (this account is what the connected Stripe MCP is authenticated as, 2026-07-16). Owns Epic Fury prices (suffix DK7Brrgheo).

acct_1Tdge9DINF9KNAIC.verified_via: founder's authenticated Stripe CLI retrieves price_1TqjVN... under this account (per task evidence + go_live.sh). Owns Story Studio prices (suffix DINF9KNAIC). NOTE: this is a DIFFERENT account than the connected Stripe MCP, so the MCP cannot retrieve its prices (reproduced 'No such price' below).

products.price_env_mapping: app reads STRIPE_PRICE_ONESTORY / STRIPE_PRICE_CREATORS (hsf/deploy/pricing.config.json -> api/create-checkout-session.js). No price IDs are hardcoded in the app; they come from Vercel env.
products.checkout_url: https://story-studio-live.vercel.app (Unlock $19 button -> POST /api/save-story -> POST /api/create-checkout-session -> Stripe Checkout)
products.health_check: POST https://story-studio-live.vercel.app/api/create-checkout-session {"product":"onestory"} should return {url: checkout.stripe.com/...}. CURRENTLY BROKEN: returns 'No such price: price_1TqjVNDINF9KNAICvsZ4Kl3t' because the live STRIPE_SECRET_KEY set in Vercel is from a different Stripe account than acct_1Tdge9DINF9KNAIC (see story_studio_stripe_mismatch evidence).
products.source_of_truth: UNKNOWN / NOT-IN-REPO — and explicitly NOT hsf/deploy. The LIVE app served at story-studio-live.vercel.app (title 'Story Studio — your life, as a cinematic storybook', loads engine.js, posts /api/save-story) exists NOWHERE in this repo: it is absent from the working tree AND from git (checked helm/h1b-r2-remediation @ 3ed760e2 = the exact deployed SHA). The production deploy carried gitDirty=1, i.e. it was built from uncommitted local files that were never committed. hsf/deploy is the INERT scaffold (different UI: story-studio-v2.html + story-engine.js) and would CLOBBER the live app if deployed. hsf/story-studio-v2.html is ALSO not the live app. CLOBBER-GUARD: do NOT `vercel deploy` from hsf/deploy or from a clean checkout; recover the live source from the story-studio-live Vercel project (redeploy an existing production build / rollback candidate) and commit it before any code change.
products.notes: The app IS deployed and the free preview works live (200 OK). It is NOT sellable: checkout throws 'No such price' due to a Stripe key/price account mismatch (root cause in docs/evidence/runtime/story_studio_stripe_mismatch_20260716T210204Z.md). Two blockers to rung 4: (1) fix the key/price account mismatch, (2) durable Vercel KV for entitlements. $0 has settled.
